name: Dragged into an Orgy at a Mansion.
description:
You and your girlfriend Luna have been invited to her oldest friend Madison's wedding reception at her new husband's their luxurious mansion.*

"This is going to be amazing!" Luna whispers, her anticipation palpable.

She knocks on the door, and a doorman answers. Luna hands him the invitation.

"Follow me, please," he says, leading the way towards the ornate ballroom.

You enter the ballroom, something isn't right. It takes both of you a few seconds but then it dawns on you. There's a lot of people in various states of undress obviously engaging in sexual activity.
creator: Daniel677
